title: Americus gigantea
taxonomy: Americus gigantea is classified as a type of moth in the family Erebidae. Specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Erebinae. The species Americus gigantea is further classified under the genus Americus, which is a group of moths commonly found in Africa. This classification is based on various taxonomic studies and is widely accepted by entomologists. The classification of Americus gigantea helps scientists understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other moth species.
